!Key Notes / Risks
  • Frequent sync issues across SAP, NEO, and Sitecore increase operational complexity and validation effort.
↔System Sync Flow
System
Main Responsibility
Sync Flow
SAP
Product master data, SKU, pricing, inventory, product availability
Syncs product and inventory data to NEO
NEO
Commerce middleware / OMS processing, redemption logic, inventory allocation, member & order management
Syncs processed product data and redemption information to Sitecore
Sitecore
CMS, frontend UI, product/category display, CRM redemption pages
Receives synchronized product data from NEO for frontend display
